programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Traves and Candy
programme.desc: Traves hopes for help with his internet girlfriend, Candy, which seems like a regular catfish. As the guys begin to learn more and more, they quickly realize there is far more to this catfishing story than it appears.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Stephanie and David
programme.desc: After Stephanie's parents' divorce, she begins to question whether she can trust people.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Alyssa and Tyler
programme.desc: After being encouraged to sign up for an online dating site by her friend, Mary, Alyssa believed she had found her true love, Tyler. As Nev and Max delve into the mystery of who exactly Tyler is, it seems possible that Mary, may in fact, be Tyler.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Mike and Kristen
programme.desc: Mike and Kristen met on Facebook but Mike's frequent efforts to meet Kristen have been futile.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Zak and Garrett
programme.desc: Zak fell for Garrett online, quickly and hard. Some strange video calls and odd disappearances have Zak worried about his online love's honesty though. Nev and Max come to help Zak solve this mystery.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Paul and Caitea
programme.desc: Paul met Caitea on Xbox and fell madly in love, but one day Caitea just disappeared. A decade later, Nev and Kamie help Paul find his first love. But what they find is one of the most shocking reveals in Catfish history.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Everyother Day Mom
programme.desc: Catelynn, Maci and Cheyenne visit Amber to support her first court hearing. Maci lets Bentley go golfing with Ryan, while Cory tells Cheyenne her priorities are not on Ryder. Mackenzie throws a birthday party for Gannon.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Not Going Down Without a Fight
programme.desc: Cheyenne throws her first fundraising event for VLCAD support. Amber's custody battle takes a turn when Andrew petitions to move James to CA. Maci strives to support PCOS Awareness Month. Mackenzie tries to file for divorce but Josh refuses to sign.

programme.title: Teen Mom: To The Rescue
programme.desc: Gary takes Amber to anger management class after audio is leaked from a dispute. Catelynn visits her psychiatrist after listening to Amber's audio leaks. Cheyenne decides to start an event planning business. Maci invites Ryan to Bentley's bday party.

programme.title: Teen Mom: This Has All Been Hell
programme.desc: Cheyenne questions the longevity of her and Matt's relationship. To Maci's surprise, Ryan shows up to Bentley's birthday party. Amber accepts a plea deal and avoids serving jail time. Catelynn and Tyler try to decide if they should let a friend move in.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Walk into the Flame
programme.desc: Amber is shocked when home security footage leaks from the night she was arrested. Andrew decides to share his side of the story. Catelynn confronts her mom about the trauma she experienced when she placed Carly for adoption.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Goodbye for Now
programme.desc: Amber starts a new romance, while Catelynn considers starting a career as a vet tech. Maci is content co -parenting with Jen, Ryan's mom, but Ryan is frustrated. Cheyenne ends her relationship with Matt, while Corey leaves to compete on The Challenge.

programme.title: Teen Mom: I Am Not Okay

programme.title: Fast Money

programme.title: Mad Money
programme.desc: Viewers will be taken into the mind of one of Wall Street's most respected money managers.

programme.title: The News With Shepard Smith
programme.desc: Shepard Smith provides deep, non-partisan news coverage and perspective on the day's most important stories. Featuring on-the-ground reporting from around the globe, go beyond the headlines to get context into the world in real time.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Home Again
programme.desc: With summer fading and trapping season around the corner, Heimo Korth works to build a new cabin for his family. The Seldens settle in and look to fill their larder with moose meat, while the Lewis family attempts to reach an old homestead by boat.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Only the Strong
programme.desc: The countdown to winter continues as Heimo breaks ground on the new cabin. Bob and his daughter embark on a river journey to the cabin where she was raised.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: The Final Preparations
programme.desc: Preparations for winter continue, and focus centers on finding food. Heimo pursues caribou meat, while Tyler and Ashley score big game, building their confidence in the bush. Bob and his daughter reminisce on the past as they arrive at their cabin home.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Alone
programme.desc: Fall continues in the bush as the Last Alaskans settle into wilderness solitude. Battling loneliness, Bob Harte welcomes a visitor to his cabin. The Seldens bask in the glory of a major triumph, while Ray Lewis is just beginning the hunt for meat.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier - The Frozen Edge: Abandoned with the Herd
programme.desc: At the Head of the Bay, Otto, Charlotte and August become stranded. Etienne helps Atz Lee with the finishing touches to his backcountry build as he still tries to navigate how to handle his PTSD, and Jewel comes for a visit.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Survival Shelter: Alaskan Homestead Heroes
programme.desc: In Alaska, the Raneys build their first-ever hydro-electric wheel for the Tubbs family. Another first is the automated homestead built for firefighter couple Kim and Casey Boespflug who live deep in the Alaskan wilderness.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier - The Frozen Edge: Abandoned with the Herd
programme.desc: At the Head of the Bay, Otto, Charlotte and August become stranded. Etienne helps Atz Lee with the finishing touches to his backcountry build as he still tries to navigate how to handle his PTSD, and Jewel comes for a visit.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Survival Shelter: Alaskan Homestead Heroes
programme.desc: In Alaska, the Raneys build their first-ever hydro-electric wheel for the Tubbs family. Another first is the automated homestead built for firefighter couple Kim and Casey Boespflug who live deep in the Alaskan wilderness.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier - The Frozen Edge: Just for the Halibut
programme.desc: The cows are grazing in the throes of spring, but will need to be redirected from eating valuable crops with some frontier ingenuity. During a fishing trip for halibut, Jane finds out that she isn't the only thing hunting for the bay's bounty.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier - The Frozen Edge: Predator Bay
programme.desc: While some of The Kilchers are busy with a runaway home improvement project Atz is on the hunt for a pair of predators that have been killing off valuable Kilcher livestock.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Kitten Cottonballs
programme.desc: Three litters of kittens pounce through the first few months of their lives.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Brooklyn Cat Fight
programme.desc: Jackson encounters Samantha, who fears her cat, Spike, so much she's been keeping him in a cat box outside her house. Also, Jackson makes his way to Brooklyn where a couple's relationship is suffering over the ongoing blood feud between their two cats.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Irwin African Adventure
programme.desc: Following Steve's dream of global conservation, the Irwins travel to South Africa. Terri helps release a wild leopard, Bindi learns from the all-female anti-poaching squad The Black Mambas, and Robert attempts to photograph Africa's 'Big Five.'

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Black Rhinos
programme.desc: Chester is home to ten critically endangered Black Rhinos. With numbers in the wild dwindling, the zoo's breeding program is a key part of preserving the species. There's concern about Kitani's ability to defend herself after damaging her horn.

programme.title: The Zoo: Walk on the Wild Side
programme.desc: The future of the American bison depends on a high-stakes race across the country. The reptile staff have their hands full with a diamond rattlesnake that needs to be medicated orally. A pair of cheetahs is trained to walk the grounds of the zoo.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Love Is in the Air
programme.desc: An adventurous couple wants to host their wedding at Treehouse Point, but all of the existing treehouses are booked. With some quick thinking, Pete convinces his family to make room for a new addition, and constructs a magical honeymoon suite.

programme.title: Tanked!: Popcorn on the High Seas
programme.desc: Wayde and Brett are recruited by Westfield Mall to fabricate two tanks including a Navy-inspired sailboat aquarium to spice up the mall's new food court.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Almost Perfect
programme.desc: Tia and two parolees scramble to rescue a dog left for dead in a dangerous part of town. A college girl from South Carolina comes looking to adopt a special needs dog. And, the parolees scramble when a dog is dumped on the rescue center's doorstep.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Not Meant to Be
programme.desc: An adopter from Texas fails to connect with the dog he drove hundreds of miles to adopt - but Tia might have the perfect match.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: To Catch a Poacher
programme.desc: A team of Wardens deploy on a multi-county night operation to stop spotlighters and road hunters. Texas Game Wardens check teal hunters on opening weekend. A dead deer found with an arrow still in it leads Game Wardens to a poacher.

programme.title: Movie: All Eyez on Me
programme.desc: The true story of musician Tupac Shakur's life. Raised by activists, the young black man grew up to be a poet, actor and one of the world's most successful rappers whose impact has only grown since his death, turning him into a global cultural icon.

programme.title: Movie: Notorious
programme.desc: Rapping on the streets of Brooklyn, Chris Wallace discovered his love and gift for song writing. On his way to the top, lies and confusion ended his life early.

programme.title: Movie: Sleepless
programme.desc: A dirty police detective's secret life is exposed when he and his partner steal cocaine from a powerful and ruthless drug lord. They kidnap his son and Vincent is forced to search for him while evading internal affairs. He risks everything for his family.

programme.title: Kobe Bryant's Muse
programme.desc: A documentary that goes behind the stats to reveal the story of Kobe Bryant's career, exploring the mentorships, allies and rivalries that have helped shape his tenure in the NBA.

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home: Trade Secrets: From Demo to Dream Home
programme.desc: A basketball player and his family who have been moving annually for 13 years are ready to settle in Florida. The old construction on their lakefront house lacks safe support in a flood zone, so Brian and Mika must demolish and rebuild the entire home.

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home: Shared Space to Dream Place
programme.desc: A couple bought their dream property years ago but are living with his mother due to financial setbacks. The family is ready to build a home of their own, but Brian and Mika must find a way to combine her understated style with his over-the-top taste.

programme.title: Ty Breaker: A Baker's Perfect Kitchen
programme.desc: Two former bakers are moving to Atlanta to be closer to their grandchildren. Ty Pennington proposes an in-law suite at their daughter's house, while Sabrina Soto plans to renovate a new home, but they both aim to win the couple over with an ideal kitchen.

programme.title: Home Town: A New Beginning
programme.desc: A photographer and close friend of the Napiers is looking for a traditional home with a touch of modern style. After deciding on a classic mansion in need of a complete makeover, Ben and Erin transform the tired house into a show-stopping home.

programme.title: Home Town: Color Psychology
programme.desc: A couple who runs a non-profit is investing in a property that provides transitional housing for women recovering from difficulties. Ben and Erin get scrappy and turn a neglected building into an uplifting oasis where new beginnings can flourish.

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home: Thinking of the Future
programme.desc: Mika and Brian are tasked with building a house for a physical therapist who dreams of having a space of her own. She has specific accessibility requests and hopes Mika and Brian can create a beautiful home that works for years to come.

programme.title: Christina on the Coast: Dysfunctional to Functional Kitchen
programme.desc: Christina returns to work after having her baby, but she may need help from her friends as she juggles a newborn and tackles her new clients' home. The couple wants a bright kitchen with a modern-farmhouse design and a layout that opens up their space.

programme.title: Christina on the Coast: Bold Kitchen for a Brit
programme.desc: A British ex-pat and his wife decide to renovate their outdated kitchen. Christina designs a modern-Craftsman look for the space, but getting all of the elements to match becomes a huge challenge.

programme.title: Christina on the Coast: A Touch of Indecision
programme.desc: Empty nesters are ready for a long-overdue kitchen remodel in their mid-century modern home, and they want tons of glam. All of that fabulousness comes with some sticker shock, however, and Christina must rein in their taste to make it match their budget.

programme.desc: Christina's clients want to update their dark and outdated kitchen, challenging her to balance their contrasting styles. She's further put to the test when rain delays the renovation and materials go out of stock.

programme.title: Home Town: An Old Familiar Place

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Faroe Islands: Spoiled Sheep and Boiled Birds
programme.desc: Andrew heads to the Faroe Islands, a mysterious Nordic wonderland. He dives into frigid waters for giant horse mussels, feasts on a fermented sheep head and blood-filled sheep stomach and eats seagulls scooped from the ocean.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: New York City
programme.desc: Andrew decides to head to his hometown for a week to recharge his battery and needs a reminder of why he got involved in global food foraging to begin with.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: UK
programme.desc: Haggis, neeps and tatties, cockles and whelks - it's either the start of a unique nursery rhyme, or a list of some of the more unusual foods Andrew is about to experience on his journey through the UK!

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Gulf Coast
programme.desc: Andrew is putting the top down as he takes a slow cruise across America's Gulf Coast in hopes of filling up on everything from pig guts to water rodents and raccoons. It's a journey filled with soul and seasoned with Cajun favourites.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Los Angeles: Spleen Soup and Sriracha
programme.desc: Andrew pulls back the curtain on the L.A. food scene. He eats fried fish fins at a high-tech fish processor, rescues a hive and its honey from a colony of Africanized bees and learns the secret to the country's hottest hot sauce.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Hawaii's Big Island: Eyeballs and Abalone
programme.desc: Andrew heads to Hawaii's Big Island, far from the tourist filled beaches. He pulls huge freshwater prawns out of hidden streams, harvests abalone from an aquaculture farm and feasts on tuna eyeballs at the local grocery store.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Alaska
programme.desc: Fermented fish heads, jellied moose nose, reindeer pizza and whitefish ice cream. Andrew is on an adventure as wild as the Alaskan bush. It's part of the Alaskan culture to eat every part of every animal and Andrew sits down to take a bite of everything.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Taiwan
programme.desc: It's off to the tropical island of Taiwan where the culture loves to eat flavourful food that stinks! Andrew tries to find the source for these smells and tries native dishes like thousand year eggs, fermented meat and rooster's testicles.

programme.title: NCIS: 16 Years
programme.desc: The NCIS murder case of a retired Navy Lieutenant Commander forces Ducky to reveal his participation in a secret society that solves cold cases.

programme.title: NCIS: Saviors
programme.desc: DiNozzo is reunited with his ex-girlfriend, Jeanne Benoit, when insurgents in Sudan attack a group of volunteer doctors, including her husband. DiNozzo and McGee travel to the crime scene for the joint murder and kidnapping case.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Monster
programme.desc: Intelligence is on the track of a pill mill spreading in the suburbs of Chicago and the doctor enabling it after the death of Judge Tommy Wells' daughter leads them to it. Voight discovers who had been leaking the 21st's information.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Rabbit Hole

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Confidential

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Chasing Monsters
programme.desc: A gang from El Salvador infiltrates Chicago and Intelligence works with a visiting detective to put an end to the crew's brutal tactics. Antonio finds himself getting close to the Salvadorian detective Marcella Gomez but learns she has a hidden motive.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Anthem

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Sisterhood
programme.desc: Intelligence tracks a vigilante killing rapists. The investigation hits home for Burgess who begins to question if the men who attacked her sister truly paid for their actions.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Profiles
programme.desc: Intelligence investigates a series of bombings targeting members of the media and enlists Firehouse 51 to help examine the devices and prevent the next attack.

programme.title: Movie: Split

programme.title: The Simpsons: Lost Verizon

programme.title: The Simpsons: Double Double Boy in Trouble
programme.desc: Bart meets his exact look-alike, Simon Woosterfield, who happens to be a member of the richest family in Springfield. When the boys decide to switch places, Bart learns that his wealthy 'siblings' are plotting his demise so they can get his inheritance.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XIX
programme.desc: Homer kills off celebrities so their likenesses can be exploited free-of-charge. Transformer-like robots duke it out in Springfield. Lisa accompanies Milhouse to a pumpkin patch to await the appearance of the Grand Pumpkin, who finally appears.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Mypods and Boomsticks

programme.title: The Simpsons: Lisa the Drama Queen

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Fear Factor
programme.desc: In a previous episode, Cesar worked with two people who were struggling to overcome their fear of dogs. Now, the tables have turned as Cesar takes on the challenge of helping dogs overcome their fears.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Playboy Playmates
programme.desc: Playboy founder Hugh Hefner's girlfriend, Miss November 2010 Shera Bechard, moved in to the Mansion with her Chihuahua mix, Willa, who needs Cesar's help to stop bullying Hef's 2-year-old King Charles spaniel Charlie.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Daytona Dogs
programme.desc: Cesar stops by the motor home of NASCAR driver Kevin Harvick and his wife DeLana to help get their Chihuahua, Lo, in line before they welcome their first child.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Hollywood Hounds
programme.desc: Cesar helps exercise guru Jillian Michaels and TV star Kelsey Grammer get a handle on their dogs to maintain their happy households.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Battle of Britain
programme.desc: With Cesar's UK holiday drawing to a close, he lends a hand to the rehabilitation of three British canines.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Deja MOO!: Polnado Warning
programme.desc: Dr. Pol is busy with patients when the tornado sirens start blaring. The whole clinic, including pets and owners must head to the basement for their safety and ride out the storm.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Deja MOO!: All Vets are Off
programme.desc: We revisit spring, the busiest time of the year at the clinic. For Dr. Pol, that means long and tiring days. We check back on his search for another veterinarian.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Udder Madness
programme.desc: Featuring emergencies with Dr. Pol and his staff.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Down and Derby
programme.desc: Many appointments and calls have the team as busy as ever.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Towers of Blood
programme.desc: Abandoned towers in southern Greece are the ruins of a fearsome warrior civilization descended from the Spartans, and new discoveries reveal the role these towers played during generations of violent blood feuds among the clans that lived here.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The World's Strangest Disaster Zones
programme.desc: A deserted city half buried, whole villages swallowed by the earth, temples turned to rubble, and an arctic town facing a deadly threat. Within these structures are the echoes of history; each haunted shell now ready to tell its own story.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Sneak Peek
programme.desc: Special sneak peek of the new season of Mysteries of the Abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Pompeii's Gate to Hell
programme.desc: An eerie complex of underground tunnels snake beneath a volcano near the ruins of Pompeii, and some believe these passages were intended as a gateway to hell. New discoveries are revealing exactly why they were built, and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of the Prison Fortress
programme.desc: Forgotten places once home to Hollywood films and a terrifying prison fortress are now neglected and haunted ruins; experts investigate their mysteries and reveal the remarkable secrets behind the most iconic and ghostly places.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Treasure of Outlaw Valley
programme.desc: Searching for a Gold Rush ghost town's legendary hidden treasure in the hills surrounding the town.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Greatest Icons
programme.desc: Places that were once home to Hollywood films and world-famous musicians are now run-down, abandoned, and forbidden; experts investigate their mysteries and reveal the astonishing secrets behind ten of the world's most iconic abandoned places.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Treasure of Outlaw Valley
programme.desc: Searching for a Gold Rush ghost town's legendary hidden treasure in the hills surrounding the town.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Devil's Prison
programme.desc: A haunted prison with a terrifying past once housed America's most notorious criminals, but today, the fortress stands in ruin, and experts reveal evidence of ghostly secrets hidden in the crumbling jailhouse walls.

programme.title: What on Earth?: World's Deadliest Threats
programme.desc: The world's most dangerous threats are in top-secret locations all over the planet, and using cutting-edge technology, experts reveal the truth behind these sinister mysteries from space.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Mystery of the Desert Shipwrecks
programme.desc: Hundreds of shipwrecks are found in the middle of a desert in Africa. Then, visit a ghost town where hundreds of its inhabitants have mysteriously died. Also, something strange happens in North Korea.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Lost City of the Kalahari
programme.desc: Satellites spot strange spiral markings in the remote African desert. A weird deadly black blob is threatening the Florida Keys. Something massive found deep beneath the ice of Antarctica.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Mystery of Fang Forest
programme.desc: A strange forest of razor-sharp stones could be home of an undiscovered Hobbit-like humanoid species. When a man-made island mysteriously appears off the US coast, grisly new evidence points to secret government experiments into psycho-chemical warfare.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Cannibal Death Pit
programme.desc: A strange circular forest is found next to a notorious cannibal site. Then, when an eerie crater is spotted in Siberia, experts uncover if it could be evidence of Nikola Tesla's doomsday device.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Curse of the Vampire
programme.desc: Terrifying new discoveries reveal the bloody truth behind the legends of vampires, and experts investigate why people believed these monsters had a taste for human blood.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Blood for the Snake God
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal the bloody origin of the feathered snake god, and experts investigate why the ancient Mesoamericans believed that human sacrifice was the only way to appease the deadly monster.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Hunting the Loch Ness Monster
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal the truth behind the Loch Ness Monster, and experts investigate the world's most mysterious waters in search of evidence that a prehistoric monster could still be lurking in the deep.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: The Dragon's Inferno
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal hard evidence showing that dragons were not just the stuff of nightmares, and experts use the latest science to explain why people believed in these wicked creatures.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Demons of the Devil
programme.desc: The latest science reveals that demons aren't just the stuff of horror stories, and as experts investigate shocking new archaeological evidence, they uncover the gruesome methods used to exorcise humans of demonic possessions.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Call of the Werewolf
programme.desc: New evidence reveals why a powerful hallucinogenic drug could be to blame for the werewolf, and people suspected of the power were hunted and killed, but even so, many admitted that they could become these deadly creatures.

programme.title: Man With a Van: Catfish Killer
programme.desc: After Kacie Woody discovers Internet chat rooms, the popular teen has her pick of high school hunks hoping to connect. The teen is exchanging IMs with her latest love interest, when a silver van creaks to a stop outside her house.

programme.title: Murder Comes Home: He Made Me Do It
programme.desc: Lila Warwick is a loving and hands-on grandmother of eight whose door is always open for holidays, birthdays or for anyone in need of a helping hand.

programme.title: Dark Waters: Murder in the Deep: Adrift
programme.desc: Newlyweds set out for the adventure of a lifetime; their dream of sailing the world together. The honeymoon comes crashing into the dangers of reality for Don when he heads to the one remote island where a serial killer could be in hiding.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: The Dangers of Success
programme.desc: As a prominent family awakens to noises in the night, their worst nightmare ensues when their beloved daughter Terri Ann McCoy is fatally shot. Investigators work through leads and lies to discover the perpetrators were closer than they realized.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: How Did I Get Here?
programme.desc: When the remains of a young mother are discovered in a remote area outside Nashville, Detective Postiglione solves the crime by recalling a detail from the wooded scene and puts a dangerous murderer behind bars.

programme.title: Atlanta Justice: Death of Innocence
programme.desc: When 9-year-old Annaijh Rolax and 15-year-old Shawn Powe are murdered in the city of Atlanta, the Atlanta Homicide team are driven more than ever to find justice for these young victims.

programme.title: Lotto, Lies & Murder
programme.desc: A woman's dream of winning the lotto in Canada turns into a living nightmare.

programme.title: Homicide City: Nine Months Murdered
programme.desc: When expectant mother Natise Johnson is found murdered days before she is due to give birth to her first child, Philly detectives focus on those closest to her. But soon they find Natise's life is much more complicated than anyone ever knew.

programme.title: Atlanta Justice: Death of Innocence
programme.desc: When 9-year-old Annaijh Rolax and 15-year-old Shawn Powe are murdered in the city of Atlanta, the Atlanta Homicide team are driven more than ever to find justice for these young victims.

programme.title: Lotto, Lies & Murder
programme.desc: A woman's dream of winning the lotto in Canada turns into a living nightmare.

programme.title: Homicide City: Nine Months Murdered
programme.desc: When expectant mother Natise Johnson is found murdered days before she is due to give birth to her first child, Philly detectives focus on those closest to her. But soon they find Natise's life is much more complicated than anyone ever knew.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: How Did I Get Here?
programme.desc: When the remains of a young mother are discovered in a remote area outside Nashville, Detective Postiglione solves the crime by recalling a detail from the wooded scene and puts a dangerous murderer behind bars.

programme.title: Grave Mysteries: Death on the Highway
programme.desc: 28-year-old Michael Sandy is an interior designer living in Williamsburg, Brooklyn. Michael loves music and making new friends on the internet. But in 2006, Michael's habit of trusting strangers he meets on the web will put his life in jeopardy.

programme.title: Grave Mysteries: Mister Wrong
programme.desc: Ty Underwood leaves her insular hometown to start fresh, vowing to be up-front with potential suitors about being transgender. Her shocking murder exposes chats with anonymous men on a phone app. The app may reveal a killer, but not identities.

programme.title: Murder by Numbers: Clown Mask Murders
programme.desc: A man is murdered by an intruder leaving his wife to witness a disturbing detail: the killer was wearing a clown mask. And when three more are killed by the same deranged clown, police realize they're dealing with a serial killer.

programme.title: What Lies Beneath: Blood Creek
programme.desc: Investigators find lies and false confessions across two states when a teenager is found dead in Kentucky.

programme.title: What Lies Beneath: Dead Before Sunrise
programme.desc: The death of a prominent charity fundraiser leaves a tiny Kentucky community reeling. Investigators find themselves brushing shoulders with criminal biker gangs in pursuit of the killer and discover a twisted motive that shocks everyone.

programme.title: Homicide City: Charlotte: Trail of Evil
programme.desc: In 1979, bar manager Harriet Simmons disappears during a trip to Nashville. In 1987, Jerri Ann Jones vanishes after she gets off work. It would take more than two decades for detectives to learn the identity of their common killer.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Escape with a Battleaxe
programme.desc: Russell Kerr is serving a 60 year sentence for a crime he says he didn't commit. He and a fellow inmate, Christopher Stout, mastermind an elaborate escape. After busting through the prison gates, they risk life and limb for their one shot of freedom.

programme.title: Deadly Sins: Sinning on the High Seas
programme.desc: Julie's the kind of girl everyone wants to be, but forbidden desires can lead to horrifying ends. Then, the future looks bright for a pair of lovebirds, Sophie & Tony, but good things don't last forever when envy takes hold.

programme.title: Highway to Hell: Hide and Creep
programme.desc: For a mom of three, a trip to the casino is a chance to escape for some fun. But when her journey is cut short and she fails to return home, her family panics and launches a search for her and her vehicle that ultimately reveals a terrible truth.

programme.title: Shadow of Doubt: Monsters Among Friends
programme.desc: A popular high school cheerleader from a rural Oklahoma town slips out her bedroom window after having a few angry words with her mother. She is never seen alive again.

programme.title: Hear No Evil: Sex, Lies and Audiotape
programme.desc: A mom accused of the murder of a stranger must clear her name by secretly-recording a confession from the man she claims is framing her. Sordid revelations of a secret life lead police to prove the guilt of an obsessive, cold-blooded killer.

programme.title: Gone: Paradise Lost
programme.desc: Charlotte Moriarty and her infant son take a five-minute stroll to the market on the small island of Oahu, Hawaii, and never come home. It will take more than 30 years to find out what happened to the mother and baby on the day that they vanished.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Death of Hitler
programme.desc: History tells us that Adolf Hitler committed suicide in his bunker in Berlin. However, some dissenting voices disagree.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Nazi King
programme.desc: The British Royal Family may have changed its name from Saxe-Coburg-Gotha to Windsor but some believe they didn't lose their allegiance to Germany. Was Edward VIII a Nazi sympathizer? Did his brother try to negotiate peace with Germany?

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Cold War Files
programme.desc: Reinhard Gehlen was the head of Nazi Germany's intelligence operation against the Soviets. That made him invaluable to the West during the Cold War but he could have told his new allies what they wanted to hear and fuelled the arms race.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: Murder at the Vatican
programme.desc: Explore four conspiracy theories relating to the Catholic Church. See if Pope John Paul I was poisoned or if the Church knew about Nazi war criminals fleeing to South America.

programme.title: Hitler: The Monster
programme.desc: Having bathed in adulation and success for a decade, Hitler reacts when the tide of war turns against him. As he struggles to stay in control, expert analysis reveals the darkest arts of his personality, driven by his beliefs.

programme.title: Hitler: The Fuhrer
programme.desc: A look at the mind of a dictator as Hitler tightens his grip on Germany and turns his sights to conquest. Experts investigate the key skills that enabled him to turn the tables on Europe's foreign leaders.

programme.title: Hitler: The Downfall
programme.desc: The final episode explores Hitler's mental and physical decline as he is forced to confront the endgame of inevitable defeat. When Hitler miraculously survives an assassination attempt, his lust for vengeance triggers an unequalled reign of terror.

programme.title: Hitler: The Victor
programme.desc: A look at Hitler's transformation from Fuhrer of the German people into the megalomaniac Nazi Messiah who triggers the global carnage of World War II.

programme.title: Hitler: The Fuhrer

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: Murder at the Vatican
programme.desc: Explore four conspiracy theories relating to the Catholic Church. See if Pope John Paul I was poisoned or if the Church knew about Nazi war criminals fleeing to South America.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Cold War Files
programme.desc: Reinhard Gehlen was the head of Nazi Germany's intelligence operation against the Soviets. That made him invaluable to the West during the Cold War but he could have told his new allies what they wanted to hear and fuelled the arms race.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Recreation
programme.desc: In this episode, we'll see how Hitler used the Olympic games to promote Nazism. How he controlled the leisure time and holidays of his Citizens by developing the world's largest travel agency. And how by constructing the world's biggest beach resort.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Megacities
programme.desc: In this episode we'll examine how the Nazis began to stamp their image on Germany and the nations that had fallen under the German jackboot. From plans to redesign Berlin as the capital of the world, to the destruction of Warsaw.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: America
programme.desc: In this episode we'll uncover support for the National Socialist movement within America, revealing outposts of Nazi Germany within the land of the free. We'll also learn about the man thought he believed he was the American Fuhrer.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Marines at Hue
programme.desc: The city of Hue, South Vietnam, was the site of one of the fiercest battles of the Vietnam War. Three under-strength U.S. Marine battalions, consisting of fewer than 2,500 men, attacked and soundly defeated overwhelming, entrenched enemy troops.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Fighting Fox: Road to Hell
programme.desc: The paratroopers of Fighting Fox Company, 2nd Battalion, 506th Parachute Infantry Regiment fought and died from Normandy to Hitler's Eagle's Nest. Their sheer determination against the enemy was matched only by their devotion to one another.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Fighting for Freedom
programme.desc: We've all heard the phrase 'go for broke,' remember the Fall of Saigon as Vietnam's bitter end, have listened to the legends spun around top-secret microfilm, and have seen the classic movie, 'the Dirty Dozen.' Here's what you haven't heard.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Pretty Boy Floyd
programme.desc: Notorious criminal 'Pretty Boy' Floyd was involved in over 30 bank robberies and perhaps as many as 20 murders.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Al Capone
programme.desc: Al Capone is America's best known gangster and perhaps the single greatest symbol of the collapse of law and order in the United States during the Prohibition era of the 1920s. The FBI branded the bootlegging kingpin America's 'Public Enemy #1.'

programme.title: Gunslingers: John Wesley Hardin: The Dark Heart of Texas
programme.desc: In the turbulent aftermath of the Civil War, a volatile gunman wages a bloody crusade against anyone who stands between himself and his notions of freedom.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Battles
programme.desc: With incredible archive from the heart of the action, and interviews with world-leading historians, this action-packed episode counts down the most decisive battles of warfare that have been caught on camera.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: The River House: Part 1
programme.desc: Mike finds a potential investment for Michael and himself, but the property is three-and-a-half hours away on St. Lawrence River. Things get even trickier as structural issues accumulate, causing stress levels to rise and the budget to go off the rails.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: The River House: Part 2
programme.desc: Mike throws Michael a curveball that has major consequences for their business partnership. The rebuild of the River House continues as they battle muck, rain and snow, and after many stressful months, the property is ready to be revealed.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: The Country House: Part 1
programme.desc: Mike and Michael buy a bungalow in the country that sits on five acres with a barn and two-car garage. It also has major water issues, leeching bed woes and a flooring battle that won't be swept under the rug.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: The Country House: Part 2
programme.desc: Mike and Michael rush to finish the Country House before winter hits, but their schedule and budget are tested when an open permit, left on the barn by previous owners, is discovered.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: An Uphill Battle
programme.desc: Lifelong Mainers bought their Belgrade cabin in 1987 and have maintained it over the years, but the list of needed repairs continues to grow. Chase and the team give the camp much-needed life by rebuilding its front wall and replacing the heating system.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Lobster Legacy Shack
programme.desc: A couple inherited their quaint cabin from his grandfather, who originally built the cabin by hand in 1978. With a newly built wharf, the team focus on transforming the former fish and lobster shack into a fun family cabin.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Retro-fit for the Whole Family
programme.desc: A couple found their own slice of heaven overlooking Lake Annabessacook, only to find out it needed more work than they could provide.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Love Yurts
programme.desc: In a show first, Chase and the crew are tasked with a relocation and land manifestation of a family yurt on an island on Togus Pond. The team enter uncharted waters knowing they have to move quickly before the pond freezes.

programme.desc: Mike, Robert, and the crew salvage an old iron ore mine that was converted into a cannery in the 1930s. Main items include a curved I-beam, oversized pressure-cookers, and a canning carousel.

programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Building Alaska: The Race Is On: The Builders Set Their Course
programme.desc: Three men set out to build three cabins in remote areas of the Alaskan Frontier. They will make preparations in the harsh Alaskan winter and race against time, the bitter cold, and the wilderness to complete their builds.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Grip It and Rip It
programme.desc: As the summer season starts to thaw out in Alaska, the builders get underway. The Alaskan elements are stubborn at all three build sites, but a little ingenuity goes a long way.

programme.title: Building Alaska: A Long Hard Slog
programme.desc: After battling the tragedy of the loss of his right-hand man, Ryan Beachy, Chuck Gerwig is back in the saddle and ready to finish the job that he and Ryan started months earlier.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Downward Slide
programme.desc: As the days get shorter and colder, and snow is visible on the highest peaks, the builders frantically race to get their homes sealed in.

programme.title: Building Alaska: The End Game
programme.desc: Winter has arrived and the race is over. It's time for each of our builders to come to terms with their end games as they pack up and head home for the season. To say this year has been a challenge would be an understatement.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Piney Woods Place
programme.desc: Cat Taylor constructs a remote sanctuary for her and her husband in the woods of Northwest Texas. The two-story home is made from sand, clay and straw.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Bamboo House
programme.desc: Bamboo-home architect David Sands builds a getaway in Hawaii with a luxurious outdoor bath area and a detached, starlit master bedroom. But volcanic eruptions threaten to send the project in smoke.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Appalachian Underground
programme.desc: A husband surprises his wife with a family vacation home on the edge of a Tennessee rock quarry.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Cabin Wanderlust
programme.desc: A young cabin builder creates a one-of-a-kind cabin in upstate New York during the harsh winter months. Due to the new and complicated design, the crew must adapt to the environment, work efficiently and leave no room for mistakes.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Omaha, Nebraska
programme.desc: Casey Webb heads to Omaha to satisfy his hunger in the heartland. He chows down on a historic Reuben sandwich, a soul food feast featuring fried chicken from a 100-year-old recipe.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Green Bay
programme.desc: Adam is at the NFL's opening game in Green Bay to showcase the city's best eats.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Breakfast Bonanza
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tour of tasty treats has convinced him that breakfast is the most important meal of the day, and he's inducting his favorites into the Man v. Food Hall of Fame.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Columbus, Ohio
programme.desc: Casey Webb's countrywide edible expedition brings him to Columbus, Ohio. His massive meals include a bacon-wrapped hot dog with a crazy combination of toppings and a footlong chicken burrito blanketed in ghost pepper sauce.

programme.title: Good Eats: Puff the Magic Mallow
programme.desc: Alton Brown shares the sweet, sticky science behind homemade marshmallows.

programme.title: Good Eats: Cran Opening
programme.desc: Alton explores the many uses of the all-American super fruit, the cranberry.

programme.title: Good Eats: Apple of My Pie
programme.desc: Host Alton Brown makes everybody's favourite: apple pie.

programme.title: Good Eats: If It Ain't Broccoli Don't Fix It
programme.desc: Alton Brown transforms broccoli from limp and bitter to crisp and delicious.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Puerto Rico
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern checks out San Juan, Puerto Rico's comfort foods, and beach eats.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Houston
programme.desc: Andrew explores Houston's Tex-Mex fajitas, Czech pastry, and Cajun mashups.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Philadelphia
programme.desc: Andrew visits Philadelphia and reveals its status as a cultural crossroads by making stops at Mexican, Indonesian and Israeli restaurants. Finally, a trip to Philadelphia isn't complete without visiting the oldest Italian restaurant in America.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Charleston, Sc
programme.desc: Andrew heads to Charleston, SC, and his first order of business is paying a visit to the queen of soul food. Then, he chows down on Gullah cuisine, a favorite among locals, and indulges in fresh seafood.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Portland, OR
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern shares the best of weird and wild Portland, OR, a city whose personality is apparent in its food culture. Local favorites include boozy doughnuts, Thai fish sauce chicken wings and even crawfish boils.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Savannah
programme.desc: Andrew dives into the flavour-packed favourites of Savannah, Georgia, like creamy shrimp and grits, briny oysters in a half shell, upscale crab bisque and down-home barbecue stew so thick it'll make your spoon stand up.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Jerusalem
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern investigates the rich culinary heritage of Jerusalem. From savory classics like shawarma, falafel, kubbeh and hummus to tempting pastries like halva and bureka, this holy city's edible icons are steeped in history.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Amman
programme.desc: Andrew introduces the rich and welcoming dishes of Amman, Jordan. The city's multicultural influences have created a culinary scene steeped in hospitality. Andrew samples some of the more well-known dishes such as towers of goat and veggies and more.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Puerto Rico
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern checks out San Juan, Puerto Rico's comfort foods, and beach eats.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Houston
programme.desc: Andrew explores Houston's Tex-Mex fajitas, Czech pastry, and Cajun mashups.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Philadelphia
programme.desc: Andrew visits Philadelphia and reveals its status as a cultural crossroads by making stops at Mexican, Indonesian and Israeli restaurants. Finally, a trip to Philadelphia isn't complete without visiting the oldest Italian restaurant in America.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Charleston, Sc
programme.desc: Andrew heads to Charleston, SC, and his first order of business is paying a visit to the queen of soul food. Then, he chows down on Gullah cuisine, a favorite among locals, and indulges in fresh seafood.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Portland, OR
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern shares the best of weird and wild Portland, OR, a city whose personality is apparent in its food culture. Local favorites include boozy doughnuts, Thai fish sauce chicken wings and even crawfish boils.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Savannah
programme.desc: Andrew dives into the flavour-packed favourites of Savannah, Georgia, like creamy shrimp and grits, briny oysters in a half shell, upscale crab bisque and down-home barbecue stew so thick it'll make your spoon stand up.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Jerusalem
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern investigates the rich culinary heritage of Jerusalem. From savory classics like shawarma, falafel, kubbeh and hummus to tempting pastries like halva and bureka, this holy city's edible icons are steeped in history.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Amman
programme.desc: Andrew introduces the rich and welcoming dishes of Amman, Jordan. The city's multicultural influences have created a culinary scene steeped in hospitality. Andrew samples some of the more well-known dishes such as towers of goat and veggies and more.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Sweet Sensations

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Bon Appetit
programme.desc: Michael McKean is all berets and baguettes as he digs into a few of France's most fantastic feasts. He crosses the pond to see if crepes could nearly kill a king.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Fire in the Hole
programme.desc: Michael McKean fans the flames of some fiery hot foods. He discovers that flaming-hot vindaloo may have once been far less combustible, wasabi isn't always what it seems and that jerk chicken is good at keeping ghosts away.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Backyard BBQ
programme.desc: Michael McKean knows that where there's smoke, there's barbecue and he's ready to put the heat to the meat. He's learning how barbecue can boost brainpower, discovering Korean barbecue is anything but and explaining why barbecue brisket may be blessed.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Tea Time
programme.desc: Michael McKean has his pinkie out because it's tea time! He's discovering espionage may have bagged us English breakfast, the egg salad sandwich has some complicated chemistry and that matcha tea may be pulling a fast one.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Into The Wild
programme.desc: Michael McKean finds his bearings and heads out into the wild blue yonder. On this appetizing adventure, he'll discover if a classic cobbler helped Lewis and Clark, and whether Girl Scout cookies can save the planet.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Paradise Nosh
programme.desc: Michael McKean finds out how poke started cooking without gas, why the Mai Tai became tied to tiki bars and if Hawaiian pizza is from the great white north.

programme.title: Charmed: Repo Manor
programme.desc: As Billie continues the search for her missing sister, the Charmed Ones are miniaturized and imprisoned in a dollhouse by a demon who hopes to channel the Power of Three and kill the Demonic Master Clan that has enslaved his demon tribe.

programme.title: Supernatural: Salvation

programme.title: Supernatural: Devil's Trap
programme.desc: Sam and Dean seek help from an old family friend who helps them lure Meg into a trap in order to find out where their father is being held prisoner. Later, a full battle ensues between the Winchesters and the demon they have been searching for.

programme.title: Supernatural: In My Time of Dying
programme.desc: Sam, Dean and John were left for dead after the Demon plowed a semi into the Impala. Now, one of the Winchesters hovers between life and death, as the surviving family must face an old and powerful adversary.

programme.title: Supernatural: Everybody Loves a Clown
programme.desc: Sam and Dean listen to a message on John's cell phone from a woman named Ellen and decide to track her down. At a small town carnival, a clown is persuading children to let him into their home so he can murder their parents.

programme.title: Supernatural: Bloodlust

programme.desc: A victim had been stabbed more than thirty times, and the only evidence investigators had was a distinctive button found at the scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Runaway Love
programme.desc: A woman is found floating in the harbor of an upscale yacht club, stabbed more than 50 times, and her ex-husband and daughter are missing. Investigators turn to forensic science to determine if they’re searching for victims... or perpetrators.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Textbook Murder
programme.desc: A woman is brutally murdered and police point to her fiancé when they learn that he was having affairs with other women. It is not until a man comes forward with information that he is no longer a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Filtered Out
programme.desc: When a teenage girl goes missing, no one knows if she ran away or if she was the victim of foul play. Everyone's worst fears are confirmed when a body is found at the bottom of an isolated ravine.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Funeral Services
programme.desc: A son calls 9-1-1 after finding his father dead in their home. When investigators arrive, an unknown male suspect is inside, but ballistic evidence points to someone else.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Expert Witness
programme.desc: A woman's tragedy may help bring closure to a 13-year-old case where a young mother was brutally sexually assaulted and killed in her own apartment.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Double Cross
programme.desc: A naval officer is found brutally murdered after threatening to report harassment.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dancing With the Devil
programme.desc: An exotic dancer who listens to voices in her head is a prime suspect.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Millionaires: Fatal Fortune
programme.desc: While an Austin, Texas media mogul clings to life after a shotgun blast to the stomach, his wife's history of psychiatric institutionalization pique's investigators interest.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Millionaires: Spoiled to Death
programme.desc: A wealthy Colorado furrier makes headlines after her ex-boyfriend is gunned down.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Covet Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: Olamide Elizabeth Adeyooye, a science major has been missing for 48 hrs, and her family grows increasingly concerned.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writing on the Wall
programme.desc: A gorgeous flight attendant is brutally murdered in her own home and the laundry list of suspects is growing by the minute. A striking clue at the scene leads investigators in the wrong direction, but will forensic evidence get them back on track?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Step by Step
programme.desc: A wealthy socialite died after falling down stairs, but was it an accident or was it murder? The laws of physics and an accident reconstructionist provided the answer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Blanket of Evidence
programme.desc: When two women are murdered in a state park, Indiana police suspected a serial killer, until they looked at the evidence more deeply and were brought in totally different directions.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fired Up
programme.desc: When a woman's charred remains are found in the rubble of a burned house, investigators have to determine if it is an unfortunate accident, or arson and murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Two in a Million
programme.desc: A millionaire and his family are executed in their own home. For three years the murders went unsolved, until a 30-year-old box of bullets and some iridescent fibers revealed the ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: Sex and Murder: After Dark: Killer Affair

programme.title: Sex and Murder: After Dark: Mommy's Dirty Deeds
programme.desc: Mike Williams mysteriously disappears on his wedding anniversary, and it looks like he may have been eaten by alligators. But looks can be deceiving. A break in the case reveals the married family man’s life wasn’t quite what he thought.

programme.title: Sex and Murder: After Dark: Mom's Deadly Secret
programme.desc: When Colorado soccer mom Paige Birgfeld suddenly vanishes, a small town is left on edge. As cops start to dig for clues, they make a shocking discovery, this devoted mom was living a secret double life.

programme.title: Sex and Murder: After Dark: The Pastor's Secrets
programme.desc: Churchgoers knew something was up when pastor Matthew Winkler didn’t show up for services. After he’s found dead on his bedroom floor, twisted sex fantasies and dark family secrets start to surface.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Single Malt Moonshine
programme.desc: Mark and Digger's plan to employ an out of work friend backfires on payday. Tim invents a low-cost way to make his first single-malt moonshine. With their backwoods column still cranking out liquor, Mike discovers Jerry isn't carrying his own weight.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Overproof and Under the Gun
programme.desc: Mark and Digger attempt oatmeal raisin shine for a high-flying Nashville customer. Mike and Jerry find themselves under the gun when they overdeliver on proof to a biker gang. Mark and Huck forge a lifeline to old-time shiners deep in the mountains.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Too Much of a Good Thing
programme.desc: As Tickle and the Laws start a massive rye run, a mysterious tip results in too much of a good thing. Jerry gets rushed to the hospital and Mike finds himself shorthanded. Tim comes up with a recipe for a first ever single malt moonshine.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Outlaw Cuts: Sweet Corn Revenge
programme.desc: With bonus scenes and added features: Mark and Huck are greeted with a gun on a mountain run while Mark and Digger land a skilled new partner. Later, Jerry attempts a drastic comeback after abandoning his column still site.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Smoke to the Fire
programme.desc: Facing more rye and apples than the Laws can run, Josh moves his steamer still to Virginia and Tickle adds smoke to the fire. Mark and Huck help Jim Tom turn cherries into shine. Mike and Jerry risk a huge run in the barn of an unsuspecting farmer.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Battle of the Backwoods
programme.desc: Judged by legends Mark, Digger and Tim, three of America's favorite moonshiners, Josh Owens, Mark Rogers and up-and-comer Daniel Maner compete to see who makes Appalachia's most authentic backwoods shine and win a rare jar of Popcorn Sutton's liquor.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Mountain Brandy
programme.desc: Legal and outlaw distillers compete head-to-head to see who makes a classic Appalachian tradition called Mountain Brandy. Judged by moonshine legends Mark, Digger and Tim, only the best will have what it takes to be named Master Distiller.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Enter the Mammoth Claw
programme.desc: Dustin's crew is finally down to virgin ground but discovers their equipment is no match for the giant boulders at Rockfall Ravine, so Wes fabricates a new tool for their arsenal: The Mammoth Claw. Fred puts greenhorn Scott to the test.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Fistful of Nuggets
programme.desc: Dustin's gamble of investing his life savings into these claims pays off after Carlos removes a monster boulder and finds chunky nuggets. Fred and crew battle the Trifecta, and a game-changing discovery proves Fred's theory of the ancient waterfall.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Rookie Mistakes
programme.desc: On a gold streak, Dustin dives deeper than ever and uncovers the largest obstacle of his career. New recruit Scott finally gets the opportunity to prove himself in the water, but a rookie mistake could end his career just as it gets started.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Happy Endings
programme.desc: Dustin calls on local legend 'The Pirate' for help cracking a boulder blocking him from the richest ground of his life. After Fred is forced to put all diving on hold, Paul returns and they're on track to get gold for the first time this season.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Dustin to the Rescue
programme.desc: Fred turns to his son Dustin for help when he uncovers a giant overhanging boulder at The Trifecta on the side wall that threatens to kill any diver below it. But tensions run high once Dustin takes control of Fred's operation.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Into the Canyons
programme.desc: Joe and Matt face down the high desert canyons of Matt's home of 20 years: southern Utah. Without knives or any modern supplies, they attempt to survive and seek rescue in this harsh terrain that's more favorable to rattlesnakes and mountain lions.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Grin and Bear It
programme.desc: Joe and Matt trek through the Alleghany Mountains of Pennsylvania, where Joe grew-up and first learned survival skills. Traveling in freezing rain, blocked by steep ravines, and deep in bear country, they're racing against Mother Nature to get out alive.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Swamplandia
programme.desc: Stranded in a black water swamp in southern Georgia, Joe and Matt are deep in alligator territory where peat bogs, mysterious floating islands, and poisonous snakes stand in the way of getting out and finding rescue.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Coastal Catastrophe
programme.desc: Marooned on a rocky coast in the Pacific Northwest, Matt and Joe struggle to get away from powerful waves and come head to head over the question of whether to hunker down or travel deeper into one of the darkest, wettest forest in the United States.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Himalayan Hardship
programme.desc: In the Himalayas, Joe seeks rescue from the rocky terrain, dense forest, and animal threats while Matt seems more interested in achieving spiritual enlightenment than getting out alive.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Namibian Nightmare
programme.desc: Stranded in the vast scrubland of Namibia, Joe and Matt are in a race to get out alive from one of the driest countries on earth. They run into trouble with a troop of baboons, proving that Mother Nature isn't the only force in the wilderness.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Ken Gets Played
programme.desc: A debtor suddenly swipes the helicopter that Ken and Danny were only seconds away from repossessing. Mike Kennedy enlists the help of his wife, Valerie, in a daring plot to seize a charter jet. Kevin is swarmed by FBI agents after an exhausting repo.

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons: Love in the Time of Corona
programme.desc: To keep boredom at bay during the summer quarantine, the kids rope Trent and Amber into viral video challenges. It's great family fun, but the cabin fever is putting a cramp in Trent and Amber's bedroom life, so they decide to try a pole dancing class.

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons: What's Cooking, Good Looking?
programme.desc: Trent and Amber meet with an intimacy coach to spice things up, and a cooking competition inspires Alex to improve his culinary skills. Jonah's girlfriend Ashley visits from Asheville, and Anna teaches new tricks to her main man -- the family dog Cruiser.

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons: Did Somebody Shrink You?

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Fishguise

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: An Awogami Is Ripe

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Birthday Boys
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is celebrating two birthdays on the farm: her husband, Nick, and his dad, Roger. She's making a lunch menu that features both of their favorites, starting with Nick's favorite chicken shawarma tacos served with a tasty Moroccan carrot salad.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Entertaining the Girls
programme.desc: Molly Yeh's girlfriends are coming over for dinner so she's preparing her go-to special menu. There's going to be make-ahead sticky rhubarb short ribs, a show-stopping crispy saffron rice dish and a fresh side of green beans with potato chip crunch.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Picnic Blowout
programme.desc: Molly Yeh starts the day off with cheesy breakfast juicy Lucys for herself and her husband, Nick. Then she assembles a picnic with pickle dip fried bologna sandwiches, falafel-y farfalle and colorful tie-dye cookies.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Merc Story
programme.desc: Ree's opened her store, The Mercantile, and she's sharing the epic tale of opening day while making three get-ahead dinners. There's family favorite butternut mac and cheese, then Tuscan bean soup. Next, she cooks up ready to go chili packets.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: 16-Minute Tex Mex
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is whipping up four 16-minute Tex-Mex marvels for breakfast, lunch, dinner and a snack. She makes a fried egg-topped Breakfast Tostada for a speedy and satisfying start to the day.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Four In Hand
programme.desc: Ree Drummond has portable food in hand with four fantastic on-the-go ideas. There's breakfast bagel burgers that are the perfect start to the day for a teenage cowboy. Taco chicken Caesar salad wraps are a great on-the-go meal.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Breakfast Freezer Faves
programme.desc: It's a busy day on the ranch for Ree Drummond as she fills her freezer with breakfast favorites and makes breakfast for the guys out working cattle. Her to-make list includes freezer breakfast paninis and very berry croissants.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Birthday for Two
programme.desc: Ree Drummond and her husband, Ladd, are celebrating their birthdays with a dinner for two. While he's out on the ranch, she makes skillet spaghetti and meatballs with her favourite cheesy pesto garlic bread pinwheel.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: Vacation at Home
programme.desc: Ree Drummond goes global for delicious inspiration while staying cozy in her kitchen. She crosses the Atlantic for an all-in-one take on a Full English Breakfast and heads to North Africa for a Chicken Tagine. Dessert is a trio of Brazilian Brigadeiros.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Victorian Hodgepodge Gets Modern Makeover

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Life on Marrs: From Rustic Cabin to Contemporary Retreat
programme.desc: Dave and Jenny Marrs reveal what really happened behind the scenes with a family who purchased a cabin on the lake after a devastating house fire. Dave and Jenny help transform this rustic cabin into their new cozy and firesafe forever home.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Historic House Gets Pretty Pink Overhaul
programme.desc: After seeing overhaul they did on her parent's house, a woman moving back to Bentonville knows that Dave and Jenny can create her dream home, too. The Marrs use her love of pink to craft the ultimate starter home that she'll never want to leave.

programme.desc: After years in a long-distance relationship, an engaged couple finally decides to start their life together in Bangkok. They're looking for a home with more space than her current condo, but finding a bigger place within their budget will be a challenge.

programme.title: House Hunters: Even Cows Need Friends in OKC

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: An Old Rancher Gets a Chef-Inspired Facelift

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: A Life-Changing, Marrs Family Renovation
programme.desc: When Jenny's parents decided to make the move to Bentonville, Arkansas, from Florida, the Marrs were thrilled to have them closer, but after months of living under the same roof, it's time for Joan and Steve to have a fabulous dream home of their own.

programme.title: Restored by the Fords: Victorian Gets Some Street Style
programme.desc: Steve and Leanne Ford are asked to tackle the first floor of an old Victorian row house that is drowning in wallpaper. Their first order of business is to brighten and lighten the whole space, then overhaul the dungeon of a kitchen.

programme.title: Restored by the Fords: Mid-Century Mess Gets Modern Makeover
programme.desc: A dark mid-century home is the wildest house on the block, but it hasn't been lived in for over a decade. Leanne and Steve Ford transform this funky home into a sleek oasis with mold remediation, plenty of demo and a bridge build.

programme.title: Restored by the Fords: First Floor Blowout
programme.desc: The Fords are tasked with updating the first floor of a regal Victorian house built in 1885. The owners of this elegant home are both young and traditional in their style, so Leanne looks to create an entertaining floor that's a perfect balance.

programme.title: Restored by the Fords: Building Character
programme.desc: A young couple needs a larger space for their family, so Steve and Leanne decide to reconfigure the floor plan to transform their small house into a home with plenty of elbowroom.

programme.title: Restored by the Fords: House With a Circle Ceiling
programme.desc: Steve and Leanne are called on to restore a mid-century modern Pittsburgh home for a pair of music lovers.

programme.title: Restored by the Fords: Let There Be Light
programme.desc: After many failed attempts at fixing up the 1920s Tudor he grew up in, a couple brings in the Fords to finish the job. Leanne wants to stay true to the era of the home, but must quickly come up with a new plan when Steve discovers water damage.

programme.title: Restored by the Fords: Take Down That Wall
programme.desc: When Steve's good friends ask for help with their 1970s contemporary home, the Fords come to the rescue. Leanne draws inspiration from a reclaimed wood mantle and brings their dream of a ski lodge in Pittsburgh to life.

programme.title: Restored by the Fords: The Power of Paint
programme.desc: A newly engaged couple that bought a mid-century modern home to start their lives together needs Leanne and Steve Ford to make it modern-day cool. The worst offender is the zig-zag kitchen which Leanne has a design solution for.

programme.title: Restored by the Fords: The Male Doily

programme.desc: Cold temperatures present the staff with challenges keeping the animals warm.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Wrath of the Minotaur
programme.desc: A new excavation at the mysterious home of the Minoans leads to a startling discovery about real-life origins of the Minotaur, and experts decode artifacts that point to bloody human sacrifices for the ferocious monster.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Dark Secrets of the Sphinx

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Revenge of the Cyclops
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal that the cyclops, a one-eyed cannibal, could have been more than just a story.

programme.desc: Scientists are using cutting edge technology to unearth a second city that, like the well-known city of Pompeii, was destroyed when Vesuvius erupted in 79 AD. This new town is revealed to be one of the most well-preserved Roman towns on earth.

programme.title: Ancient Unexplained Files: Curse of Mummified Beast
programme.desc: Archaeologists excavating Egyptian catacombs are baffled to discover dozens of mummified cats in a maze of tombs; historians turn to science and cutting-edge analysis to decode their purpose and discover secrets behind an ancient religious practice.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Dead Sea Scrolls: New Evidence
programme.desc: Experts investigated the Dead Sea Scrolls, which have been kept top-secret for decades by the Vatican. These could reveal the location of tunnel holding billions of dollars of treasure.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Dark Truths of the Templars
programme.desc: Templar fact and fiction have become blurred by their depictions in book and on film. However, we present a very different picture that challenges head on the orthodox beliefs about an order that angered much of Europe, particularly France.

programme.title: Ancient Unexplained Files: Curse of Mummified Beast

programme.title: Impossible Fixes: Tower of Terror
programme.desc: Fearless technicians battle staggering heights and fierce winds to upgrade a communications tower that keeps millions connected; special access to this dangerous job site reveals what it takes to get the job done.

programme.title: Impossible Fixes: Storm Surge Emergency
programme.desc: When sea levels rise, storm surge barriers work overtime to fight off devastating floods. To get this tough job done, a team of experts maintain these engineering marvels to prevent catastrophe and keep millions of people safe.

programme.title: Impossible Fixes: Hell on Water
programme.desc: A committed crew of mariners race against the clock as they dredge North America's busiest shipping canal to allow safe passage for huge oil tankers, and specialists repair years of heavy damage and corrosion to get a massive ferry safely operating.

programme.title: Impossible Fixes: High-Wire Hell
programme.desc: Working thousands of feet above the California desert, brave engineers and fearless crews perform perilous high-wire acts to keep the hi-tech tramway system operating safely for the hundreds of daily tourists it transports.

programme.title: Impossible Fixes: Mission Las Vegas
programme.desc: Brave lighting technicians battle extreme desert conditions to keep the lights bright in Las Vegas; they put their lives at stake to perform risky neon bulb replacements at terrifying heights and surrounded by hundreds of volts of electricity.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Leaning Towers of Terror
programme.desc: A city with hundreds of leaning buildings, the world's scariest airport, and the world's biggest sewage pipe are home to engineering disasters in need of repair, and experts use cutting-edge technology to reveal if they can be fixed.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Death Ray Skyscraper
programme.desc: A skyscraper so dangerous that it can melt cars, a bridge fiasco, and a stadium roof on the brink of disaster are engineering catastrophes in need of repair, and experts use cutting-edge technology to reveal if they can be fixed.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Peril at the Airport
programme.desc: An airport that's sinking into the sea, a strange tower that goes wrong, and a dangerous bridge in Venice are engineering catastrophes in need of repair, and experts use cutting-edge technology to reveal if they can be fixed.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Holes from Hell
programme.desc: Engineering catastrophes include a giant tunnel boring machine stuck underground, a village sinking into a mountain, and massive holes that could derail a train.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Disaster in Vegas
programme.desc: Experts assess a giant sinkhole, a multi-million dollar road to nowhere, and a wind turbine on the brink of disaster, and determine if these engineering catastrophes can be repaired.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Stadium Disaster
programme.desc: A stadium on the brink of collapse, an upside-down bridge, and a massive subway project in crisis are engineering catastrophes in need of repair, and experts use cutting-edge technology to reveal if they can be fixed.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Terror at Doomsday Dam
programme.desc: When America's tallest dam threatens to burst, a nearby town finds itself an hour away from total annihilation, and engineers use cutting-edge technology to reveal what went wrong and if disaster can be averted.

programme.title: The Perfect Suspect: The Killer in the Corn
programme.desc: When a young couple is found murdered and mutilated on the outskirts of a small town in Ohio, police work tirelessly to build a case against an unlikely suspect. It will take more than twenty-five years for the terrible truth to finally be revealed.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Life on the Line
programme.desc: Cousins Ana Franklin and Jennifer Holliday are traveling home late one night when terror strikes. As Jennifer is taken hostage by an unstable man, she soon connects with a 9-1-1 operator who will stop at nothing to see that Jennifer makes it out alive.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Dirty Little Secret
programme.desc: Close friends are investigated after the death of an 83-year-old grandfather who was having an affair with a woman half his age.

programme.title: See No Evil: Vanished at Noon
programme.desc: On November 26th, 2014, Jessica Padgett disappears. The only lead is her abandoned white Subaru. Surveillance cameras show her driving into a parking lot and walking down a back alley, never to return.

programme.title: See No Evil: Goodnight Jessika
programme.desc: On September 7th, 2009, 27-year-old Jessika Kalaher is found strangled in her car in Cedar Park, Texas. With her wallet and car keys missing, detectives turn to security cameras to answer who and why.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: While I Was Gone
programme.desc: Michele Ward was always glad that her husband, Richard Daniel Starrett, didn't mind her frequent trips to visit her parents. She never guessed that he sent her away because his sick perversion was getting harder and harder to hide.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Live to Tell: Surviving Ted Bundy
programme.desc: Three women who were attacked by the notorious serial killer Ted Bundy reveal their terrifying stories of that night, and their healing and hope.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: We're Watching You
programme.desc: 40 year-old Rachael Anderson, mother of four, calls an old friend one Friday evening in April 2010 about a home improvement project she'd never complete. Eight years later, she's still missing, and two men are behind bars.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: While I Was Gone
programme.desc: Michele Ward was always glad that her husband, Richard Daniel Starrett, didn't mind her frequent trips to visit her parents. She never guessed that he sent her away because his sick perversion was getting harder and harder to hide.
