programme.title: See No Evil: Goodnight Jessika
programme.desc: On September 7th, 2009, 27-year-old Jessika Kalaher is found strangled in her car in Cedar Park, Texas. With her wallet and car keys missing, detectives turn to security cameras to answer who and why.

programme.title: Extreme Measures: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: Lack of answers in her daughter's murder force a mother to embark on a years-long quest to change nationwide laws that finally allow her to catch a killer.

programme.title: Extreme Measures: Try, Try Again
programme.desc: When a single mother with a 4-year-old daughter is murdered, the case threatens to go cold until the little girl grows up and vows to get justice.

programme.title: Bride Killa: Deadly Vows
programme.desc: Filled with overwhelming jealousy, 48-year-old reformed bad boy Robert Arvizu accuses his new bride Courtney Burton of being too flirtatious. In a blind rage, he faces off against his beautiful newlywed and their fiery romance takes a horrific turn.

programme.title: Happily Never After: The Devil's Devotion
programme.desc: Godly Llius finds her eternal forever when she pledges her love to music promoter Tony. But their holy union is disrupted in the most gruesome of ways. As detectives look closer, sinister truths emerge from the darkness to reveal a devilish devotion.

programme.title: Wicked Attraction: A Recipe for Disaster
programme.desc: Criminal lovebirds Roger Gillett and Lisa Chamberlin plan a quiet trip out of town to keep police off their trail. But when they show up at Roger's cousin's home, things quickly spiral out of control leading authorities to a barn filled with horrors.

programme.title: Wicked Attraction: Prey For Me
programme.desc: Suburban housewife Dawn Fowler is tired of her crippled husband, Richard. With made-up tales of Richard's 'abuse', Dawn hatches a plan to seduce a youth pastor, Robert Heydman, and convince him to kill her husband and free her from his reign of terror.

programme.title: Deadly Secrets: Killer Colleagues
programme.desc: Zoe Pulver and Jane Long have great jobs working for Ashley Pollow, a talented tax attorney in Florida. But Ashley also has a violent temper, and when a grisly murder takes place at the office, Jane and Zoe find themselves way too close to the killer.

programme.title: A Stranger in My Home: Evil In the House of the Lord
programme.desc: In Nashville, a fire engulfs a local church. Once the flames are out, firefighters find a charred body, and it looks like it's the church pastor, Rev. David Terry. The body has been dismembered and beheaded. The last man to see Terry alive is missing.

programme.title: Surviving Evil: Written in Blood
programme.desc: A stay-at-home mom's idyllic life is shattered when she becomes the target of a disturbed predator disguised as the boy next door. With rape and murder on his mind, Donnie Russell is a twisted sociopath just waiting for his opportunity to pounce.

programme.title: Murder by Numbers: You Could Be Next
programme.desc: Theories arise when a sheriff's wife opens a door to a blaze of gunfire. When more citizens are shot at their front doors, everyone's left wondering who's next.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: The Deacon's Demise
programme.desc: In 1992, a church deacon from Upland, CA is found murdered in Tijuana. Did a secret double life lead to the death of this married father of four? Years later, a fresh look at the case helps investigators unravel the complex plot to murder the deacon.

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door: Murder in Paradise
programme.desc: When pretty Nags Head tourist Janet Siclari turns up dead on the beach outside her hotel, the fun comes to an end. When a hurricane blows leads out of town, police wonder if the killer escaped too. Only time can help detectives catch the culprit.

programme.title: Weaponology: Tanks
programme.desc: Uncover the killer genes in the tank's family tree.

programme.title: Weaponology: Waffen SS
programme.desc: The Waffen SS were Nazi Germany's ultimate warriors, armed with futuristic weapons and backed up by an unrivalled fanaticism. Weaponology travels through time to explore the men, machines, and moments that shaped this feared fighting force.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler: The Menace
programme.desc: See how Hitler succeeded in conquering Germany. Nothing predestines this mediocre student and failed artist to become dictator of Germany the Führer.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler: The Fuhrer
programme.desc: 1929. Germany, harshly affected by the worldwide economic crisis, is sinking into despair. Bloody street fighting between Nazis and Communists is raging. Fear of the 'Red peril' will push millions of voters into Hitler's arms. Democracy is at risk.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Saddam: The Butcher of Baghdad
programme.desc: The story of Saddam Hussein, the sadistic tyrant who ruled Iraq with an utter contempt for humanity for 23 years, a man whose cruelty knows no limits and who'll stop at nothing to achieve the power of life and death over millions of people.

programme.desc: See how Osama bin Laden's journey unfolds from his roots as a privileged young Saudi boy to becoming the formidable leader of al-Qaeda, and his lifetime commitment to violent jihad against the West. This resulted in the horrific 9/11 attacks in 2001.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Hitler: The Benchmark of Terror
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler murders six million Jews and invades peaceful countries brutally killing anyone in his way. Find out what could turn a high school dropout into the most evil dictator the world has ever seen.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Kim: North Korea's Evil Dynasty
programme.desc: North Korea's evil dictator, Kim Jong-il, ruled his country for 17 years without mercy. While personally enriching himself, he let his people starve to death and threatened to bring the world to the brink of a third world war.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Stalin: Russia's Steel Tyrant
programme.desc: For 30 years, Joseph Stalin rules the Soviet Union with an iron fist. Anyone who stands in his way will be destroyed.

programme.desc: Francois Duvalier trained as a medical doctor, but his healing touch was lost as he became the ruthless dictator 'Papa Doc.' The tools of his tyranny were violence and Voodoo. He killed 30,000 people, and kept a nation in fear of his mystical powers.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Aircraft
programme.desc: Find out about aircraft important to conflicts in the 20th and 21st centuries.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Falling Dominoes
programme.desc: The USSR pulls out of Afghanistan and the last remaining proxy conflict of the Cold War ends. A new era emerges as brutal barriers are broken down. A peaceful transition is what the watching world prays for, but is by no means a sure thing.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Falling Dominoes
programme.desc: The USSR pulls out of Afghanistan and the last remaining proxy conflict of the Cold War ends. A new era emerges as brutal barriers are broken down. A peaceful transition is what the watching world prays for, but is by no means a sure thing.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Gaddafi: Mad Dog of the Middle East
programme.desc: The story of the world's longest serving dictator, Muammar Gaddafi, and his 42 year reign of terror at home in Libya and around the world. His actions are so increasingly insane that President Reagan dubs him The Mad Dog of the Middle East.

programme.title: Hitler: The Monster
programme.desc: Having bathed in adulation and success for a decade, Hitler reacts when the tide of war turns against him. As he struggles to stay in control, expert analysis reveals the darkest arts of his personality, driven by his beliefs.

programme.title: Hitler: The Fuhrer
programme.desc: A look at the mind of a dictator as Hitler tightens his grip on Germany and turns his sights to conquest. Experts investigate the key skills that enabled him to turn the tables on Europe's foreign leaders.

programme.title: Hitler: The Downfall
programme.desc: The final episode explores Hitler's mental and physical decline as he is forced to confront the endgame of inevitable defeat. When Hitler miraculously survives an assassination attempt, his lust for vengeance triggers an unequalled reign of terror.

programme.title: Hitler: The Victor

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Georgia Mountain Treehouse
programme.desc: A couple sets out to create their dream treehouse retreat in Northern Georgia overlooking the Blue Ridge Mountains. Although the build calls for a mile-long, uphill trek with their materials, the end result is the ultimate childhood dream come true.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Ohio Valley Hut
programme.desc: Two brothers build a high-end, off-grid vacation home on their Ohio family's cattle ranch.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Floating Castle
programme.desc: Marine scientists in Florida hire engineers Nicolas Derouin and Arnaud Luguet to create a first-of-its-kind floating home. They have nine months to complete it, but unpredictable weather and building hiccups may sink this project before it can swim.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Vermont Stone House
programme.desc: Novice builder Danny Clark attempts to construct a 600-square-foot stone cabin in Vermont's White River Valley. The home is sure to be a true work of art but his inexperience, the harsh winter and the unusual architecture push him to his limits.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Island Oasis
programme.desc: Beth wants a beach getaway on the white sandy beaches of Ambergris Caye, Belize. Ken Grissom and his crew transport building materials to the remote island and construct an off-the-grid luxury getaway with the Caribbean water just steps away.

programme.title: Grand Designs: Unbelievable Builds: Modern Meets Historic
programme.desc: Lori and Maugan are building a unique, modern home in one of the most historic suburbs in Melbourne, Australia. The house features quirky elements, including a trapeze net, underground car-parking stacker and a 10-foot paper plane garden structure.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Earth Block Ranch
programme.desc: A family builds thousands of earth blocks while withstanding winter monsoons, freezing temperatures and more to finish their San Antonio forever home.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Carolina Catamaran
programme.desc: A couple of pro builders construct an upcycled off-grid homestead deep in the sprawling South Carolina islands. Plans for the catamaran-style home include a luxury yacht aesthetic, but the couple must build during hurricane season to meet their deadline.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Budget Bungalow

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: The Weekender

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Feast Over Flame
programme.desc: Visit Skylight Inn, family-run restaurant in North Carolina who have been serving whole hog-style barbecue since the mid 1800s.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fire Trucks
programme.desc: Big Red Rig, a bright red, double-decker, thirty-foot trailer tricked out with two massive smokers cooking traditional pulled pork.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fired-Up Chefs
programme.desc: Two chefs from Texas who love to play with smoke and fire in their restaurants. Tom Spaulding serves classic Texas-style barbecue at his restaurant Live Oak and Tim Byres rolls out spice-rubbed chickens from his unique wood-burning rotisserie.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Smoked Out
programme.desc: Where there's fire, there's smoke, and some of the most flavourful meat on the market.

programme.title: Eddie Eats America: Brooklyn
programme.desc: World's Strongest Man winner, Eddie Hall hits Brooklyn to take on a huge Mac and Cheese eating challenge, sample NYC's best cheesecake and bend metal with a Coney Island strongman.

programme.title: Eddie Eats America: Houston
programme.desc: In Houston, Eddie faces the grim reaper in a crazy crawfish challenge featuring the fearsome Reaper Pepper, devours real southern comfort-food and pulls a full-sized plane down a runway.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Portland, OR
programme.desc: Casey heads to Portland, Oregon, to taste mouth-watering Peruvian chicken, a succulent porchetta sandwich and a two-pound burrito packed with ten of the spiciest peppers in the world.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Chicago, IL
programme.desc: Casey travels to Chicago for some epic Windy City eats, including a massive triple-threat pork sandwich and a challenge featuring a two-pound double bacon cheeseburger and two pounds of 'Irish Nacho' cheese fries.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Des Moines, IA
programme.desc: Casey heads to Des Moines, Iowa, where he'll attempt to eat an overstuffed pulled pork sandwich slathered in a scorpion pepper hot sauce in ten minutes.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Charleston, SC
programme.desc: Casey heads to Charleston, SC, for some epic low country eats. He takes on the belt buster challenge where he must consume a two-pound burger, three pounds of nachos, a hulking order of tater tots and a 12-ounce milkshake in 20 minutes.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Lafayette, Louisiana
programme.desc: Casey Webb's food fling finds him in Lafayette, La., for savoury Cajun stew and a stuffed and spicy sandwich specialty. He also accepts the Devil's Bowl Challenge- a scorching-hot bowl of ramen.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Florida Keys
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels take him to the Florida Keys for a bad-to-the-bone shrimp burrito and Ropa Vieja at a Cuban institution. Then he grabs a fork for the largest slice of pie he's ever seen in The Fish House's Key Lime Pie Challenge.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Meat Lover's Madness
programme.desc: Michael Symon heads to his hometown of Cleveland to visit a brewery that revolutionizes classic pub fare with decadent confit chicken wings in chipotle-maple glaze.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Sausages, Franks and Dogs
programme.desc: In Sagaponack, N.Y., Michael Symon heads to a smokehouse where succulent, slow-smoked pork ribs are mopped with a tangy, citrus barbecue sauce. In Columbus, Ohio, there's a beefy burger topped with smoky kielbasa.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Bacon Behemoths
programme.desc: Michael Symon heads to Providence, where a traditional Rhode Island hot wiener in a crepe topped with chili is the ultimate local comfort food. In Indianapolis, he digs into a steak patty topped with Chinese char siu slaw.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Burnt Ends For Breakfast
programme.desc: Michael Symon heads to Plainview, N.Y., where a chocolate bacon burger is loaded from top to bottom with sweet and savory indulgence. A restaurant in Columbus, Ohio, has a soy-marinated pineapple hanger steak draped over spicy kimchi fried rice.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: San Diego Surf 'n' Turf

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Quebec City
programme.desc: Andrew scopes out the creative, rustic comfort dishes of Quebec City, Canada. Influenced by French and English settlers, the city is full of old world charm, late-night diners, hearty food and plenty of maple syrup.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Puerto Vallarta

programme.desc: Alvin sneaks into Simon's new virtual reality game and is transported to a world in desperate need of a hero. The chipmunks discover Officer Dangus has a twin brother.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Lights Camera Uh-Oh/ Wax Dave
programme.desc: The Chipmunks have 48 hours to help Jeanette make a student film. But every chipmunk has a very different movie in mind. The Chipmunks follow Dave and find out he's fallen in love with a dangerous woman who wants to turn him into a wax statue.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The App/ Don Juan Theodoro
programme.desc: When Dave gets a parenting app to help supervise the Chipmunks, Alvin tries everything to escape its control. Alvin, Simon, and the Chipettes give Theodore conflicting dating tips when they believe he has a crush on a girl.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Who's Your Daddy/ Homewrecker
programme.desc: Dad can't attend a Squirrelly Scout Festival; Vicky frames Timmy for destroying his house.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Weirdos on a Train/ Tons of Timmys
programme.desc: Dad and Crocker make a deal. As a result, Crocker becomes best friends with Dinkerberg. Timmy wishes up 5,000 Timmys for the Planet of the Dads. The Timmys kidnap Wanda and Cosmo.

programme.title: T.U.F.F. Puppy: Dog House/ Time Waits for No Mutt
programme.desc: Dudley moves out of his mom's house and into a tree house with his new roommate, Partpans (which is definitely not Snaptrap spelled backwards). Then, Chameleon, Snaptrap and Birdbrain try to keep Dudley from getting to work so he will be fired.

programme.title: Back at the Barnyard
programme.desc: Otis and his friends have adventures while trying to protect the farm they live on.

programme.title: The Adventures of Jimmy Neutron: Boy Genius: Lights Camera Danger
programme.desc: A famous film director is coming to Retroville to make his next big movie.

programme.title: The Adventures of Jimmy Neutron: Boy Genius: Who's Your Mommy/ Clash of the Cousins
programme.desc: A substance sticks to Carl; the Neutron family celebrates a great aunt's birthday.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Talkin' Teddy/ Principal Interest
programme.desc: Theodore's new talking-teddy bear is driving Alvin and Simon nuts. Alvin is none-too thrilled about going back to school. That is until he sees the new Principal and then it's love at first sight.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Alvin's Wild Weekend/ For Whom the Bell Tolls
programme.desc: Alvin begs Dave to spend a weekend alone with him. A hypnotist accidentally turns Simon into a bumbling fool before an academic contest.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Super Heroes/ She's Got Style
programme.desc: When Theodore thinks he's a real superhero, Alvin and Simon have a tough time convincing him he's not. Brittany is embarrassed by Jeanette's lack of style until Jeanette is proclaimed a fashion trendsetter by Brittany's icon.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Mutiny/ Reality or Not
programme.desc: Desperate to avenge last year's loss, The Chipmunks argue over who is best suited to lead them to victory. Later, Alvin is tired of seeing his celebrity status overshadowed by Reality TV stars. So, he decides to become one.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Return to New York
programme.desc: The turtles return to the city to search for Splinter, only to find that the city is overrun with Kraang.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Serpent Hunt
programme.desc: As the turtles seach for Karai, they have to deal with a city filled with Kraangdroids as well as Zeck and Steranko, who hunt Karai for their own means.

programme.title: Power Rangers Beast Morphers
programme.desc: The Power Rangers Beast Morphers were created to fight crime in the Morphin Grid.

programme.title: Power Rangers Beast Morphers
programme.desc: The Power Rangers Beast Morphers were created to fight crime in the Morphin Grid.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Operation: Normal/ Sparring Partner
programme.desc: Leo and Donnie try desperately to help April enjoy a quiet day with a new friend. Raph becomes friends with a new sparring partner and must keep it secret from his brothers who don't like the guy.

programme.title: It's Pony: Dash/ Took
programme.desc: A normal girls' life is made extraordinary by her best friend: a hilarious talking pony.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Hey Now, You're a Brawl Star
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Hide and Seek/ That Sinking Feeling
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb shrink their friends while playing hide and seek.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: What Do It Do?/ Atlantis
programme.desc: Candace thinks she finally has a strange device to show Mom and bust Phineas and Ferb when Agent P knocks Dr. Doofenshmirtz's latest '-inator' into the boys' front yard. Phineas and Ferb then reconstruct the device to find out what it does.

programme.title: The Owl House: Adventures in the Elements
programme.desc: Luz needs to learn a new spell, so Eda takes her to the most magical place on the island to train.

programme.title: Amphibia: Sprig vs. Hop Pop / Girl Time
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Amphibia: Lost in Newtopia/ Sprig Gets Schooled
programme.desc: Anne and Polly vow to experience the city like locals but end up on a wild ride through the streets of Newtopia. Sprig is offered a spot at Newtopia University.

programme.title: DuckTales: Challenge of the Senior Junior Woodchucks!
programme.desc: Huey races against Violet in a challenge to be named Senior Junior Woodchuck. Scrooge and the family search for a secret Woodchuck treasure.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Baymax Returns: Part II
programme.desc: When Yama unleashes an army of destructive robots on the city, Hiro and his friends must don their gear and truly become Big Hero 6.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Rat-a-Phooey!
programme.desc: Parker learns to headbutt in TABS while Jack tries to perform parkour on ice in Fortnite. Cupquake and Red team up to keep rats out of the kitchen while cooking on the highway.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb Interrupted/ A Real Boy
programme.desc: Candace spends the day with her mom in the backyard so that she can bust her brothers. Then, Dr. Doofenshmirtz thinks Vanessa overhears him say he would rather have a son, so he zaps her with the Forget-About-It Ray.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Picture This/ Nerdy Dancin'
programme.desc: The boys build a transport device so that they can retrieve Ferb's skateboard from England. Candice asks Jeremy to be her dance partner in a dance show, but Jeremy can't dance.

programme.title: Amphibia: Truck Stop Polly/ A Caravan Named Desire
programme.desc: Feeling unappreciated by her family, Polly hatches a plan to make them pay attention to her. Hop Pop signs the family up to join a traveling theater troupe, hoping to realize his dream of being an actor.

programme.title: Amphibia: A Night at the Inn/ Wally and Anne
programme.desc: The Plantars stay at an inn for a night, but Polly discovers the caretakers aren’t what they seem. Everyone calls Anne crazy when she claims to have seen the Moss Man.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Mark Falls Flat
programme.desc: Mark gets lost in Human Fall Flat, Lauren cooks up some virtual hot dogs, BBXH battles a massive sea monster, and Jack protects the goats in Spyro.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Mark on Fire
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: The Owl House: The Intruder
programme.desc: Luz and King must defend The Owl House from a mysterious intruder.

programme.title: The Owl House: Covention
programme.desc: Luz learns about witch covens, but her lesson goes awry when she finds herself thrust into a witch's duel!

programme.title: Parker Plays: And I'm Shelby...
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Give Me All Your Cheese
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Clash of the Cranky Chefs
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cursed!/ Fiddle Me This
programme.desc: After Anne helps Sprig break up with Maddie, strange things start happening to them. When a popular talent competition comes to Wartwood, Hop Pop goes overboard in training Sprig to win.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Ballad of Hopediah Plantar/ Anne Hunter
programme.desc: Hop Pop's efforts to be hailed as a hero amongst some small-town folks backfires when he stands up to the wrong family. Then, when the family is in danger, Anne must put her self-consciousness aside in order to learn the true way of the hunter.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Mom's Birthday Episode/ Journey to the Center of Candace
programme.desc: Candace wants to plan a special birthday for Mom; Phineas and Ferb build a submarine.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Crack That Whip/ The Best Lazy Day Ever
programme.desc: The guys build a roller derby rink for their grandma.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Scary-oke
programme.desc: Kyle wants to be smart like his younger sister. When The Cortex overhears this, he decides to exploit Kyle's dream. Then, Motho Jr. doesn't want to wreak havoc like the stereotypical movie monster his dad is, he just wants to dance.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Society of the Blind Eye
programme.desc: The kids, along with Old Man McGucket's help, discover there is a secret society on Gravity Falls.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Into the Bunker
programme.desc: Dipper's secret journal pages lead him and the gang to the author's hidden bunker where they find themselves face-to-face with a mysterious figure from Gravity Falls' lore.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Sock Opera
programme.desc: In an attempt to impress a local puppeteer, Mabel decides to put on a huge sock puppet rock opera, but her show goes awry when Dipper’s drive to uncover journal secrets leads to a supernatural disaster.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Don't Even Blink/ Chez Platypus
programme.desc: A determined Candace decides to find out where her brothers creations disappear to, and Phineas and Ferb open a platypus themed restaurant.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Magnificent Few/ S'winter
programme.desc: As cowboys, Phineas and Ferb drive a herd of cattle across the badlands. Dad shows the boys how to make snow cones with a machine.

programme.title: Amphibia: Scavenger Hunt/ The Plantars Check In
programme.desc: Anne, Sprig and Marcy receive a mysterious message from the king of Newtopia that sends them on a puzzle-solving mission. Anne finally meets with King Andrias and tries to enlist his help in getting back home.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Big Bugball Game/ Combat Camp
programme.desc: Anne must learn the value of teamwork to win the town’s annual Bugball game.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Dead Man's Drop/ Stumped
programme.desc: Kick's newest and terrifying stunt is conquering Dead Man's Drop but Brad interrupts.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: K-Nein/ Bromance
programme.desc: Kick rescues an injured stray dog, but when he discovers she's a safety dog, trained to prevent accidents, Kick must decide between keeping the dog and being a daredevil.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Kicked Out/ Kick the Habit
programme.desc: When Kick's new hangout is taken over by Brad and his friends, Kick does everything in his power to keep the newfound space as his own.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Brad's Diary/ Sew What
programme.desc: Dad forces Kick and Brad to behave and stay out of each other's personal belongings.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Frame Story/ And ... Action!
programme.desc: The principal accuses Kick of a crime he didn't commit, threatening to expel him from school. When Kick meets his female counterpart in a popular TV actress, he helps her discover her inner daredevil.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Say Cheese/ Pinch Sitter
programme.desc: Kick and his siblings must overcome their differences to replace a picture they broke.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Things That Make You Go Boom!/ Kyle Be Back
programme.desc: Kick battles Brad to win a scavenger hunt; Kick's cousin tries to break a stunt record.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Pool Daze/ Live-In Wade
programme.desc: Kick leads his friends in a battle for freedom and fun when the lifeguards at the community pool force them to stay in the kiddie pool.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Switching Gears/ Garage Banned
programme.desc: Kick's bike is badly damaged hours before the annual BMX Rodeo. The competition gets fierce when Kick decides to ride the Mustang Menace, a supposedly untameable bike. Brad forms a band and takes over the garage, so Kick decides to form his own band.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Crumbs!/ Stay Cool
programme.desc: Kick must keep Mom's cookies away from Dad, a relentless cookie-fiend.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Kart to Kart/ Kyle 2.0
programme.desc: When Gordie Gibble buys Mellowbrook's go-kart track, he bans the Buttowskis. Kick spends time with cousin Kyle in order to score tickets to Dirk Bike Mike's Demo-Cross.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Brad's Room/ Dude, Where's My Wade?
programme.desc: When Kick's room is destroyed, Dad grounds Kick and makes him move into Brad's room where he must abide by his older brother's ridiculous rules. Kick and Gunther follow clues to track down Wade when he goes missing before the safety inspector's visit.

programme.title: This Just In
programme.desc: A socially awkward teenage girl arrives at a new school and falls quickly into a group of rather electric friends, each with their own quirks. They find they have a unique bond, all centering around the school's television channel.

programme.title: Veterans' Voices: Honoring Those Who Serve
programme.desc: Veterans' voices honours our nation's cherished veterans and all those who serve in every branch of our military.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Break Out the Campaign
programme.desc: Vanessa turns to Mike and Carol for advice on her State Assembly campaign, while Kyle is overcome with anxiety when Ed gifts him an expensive watch.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Extrasensory Deception
programme.desc: When Kyle and Mandy individually reveal a secret to Mike and Vanessa respectively, they are sworn not to tell the other. Meanwhile, Ryan invites Mike to be a guest on his podcast and Vanessa and the girls devise a plan to pay back a ride waiter.

programme.title: Black-ish: Nothing But Nepotism
programme.desc: Bow urges Dre to use his connections and secure Zoey a fellowship, but he doesn't want his daughter relying on nepotism. When Bow finds Zoey a place at the hospital, Dre balks at the idea and successfully pulls some strings at Teen Vogue.

programme.title: Black-ish: Pops' Pops' Pops
programme.desc: Jack and Diane look for clues about their roots for their class assignment, a history of the Johnson family. When they can't find anything out about the family's past, Pops comes to the rescue with the colourful story.

programme.title: Batwoman: Prior Criminal History
programme.desc: Ryan is back to facing life as herself. Alice has a new plan to get the attention of Gotham and Safiyah. Luke and Mary are desperate to find a stand-in with Kate still missing. Ryan wears the suit and comes face-to-face with Alice for the first time.

programme.title: Charmed: An Incovenient Truth
programme.desc: The Charmed Ones' lives are in jeopardy as The Faction closes in. Macy and Harry struggle to define their relationship.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Implant
programme.desc: Jerry dumps his girlfriend after Elaine suspects her figure is the result of implants. Kramer claims to have seen Salman Rushdie at the health club. George tries to obtain a death certificate in order to get a discount on airfare.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Handicap Spot
programme.desc: An angry mob comes after George and Jerry when they park a car in a handicap spot.

programme.title: Mom: Hacky Sack and a Beautiful Experience
programme.desc: Christy’s smoking causes problems when the ladies take a road trip. Also, Bonnie offers Adam unsolicited business advice.

programme.title: Mom: Big Floor Pillows and a Ball of Fire
programme.desc: Christy and Bonnie are suspicious when Adam’s best friend, Mitch, returns, insisting he’s a changed man.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the 10 Inches
programme.desc: When Max and Caroline need more space for their renovated dessert bar, they're willing to do just about anything to convince Angie, the brash owner of the pizza place next door, to rent them her back office.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Big Gamble
programme.desc: Max and Caroline discover Han is in hot water with a gang after he amasses a substantial debt from gambling on women's tennis and can't repay it.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Four of a Kind
programme.desc: Four wealthy one percenters are left for dead outside a hospital emergency room in a twisty- curvy murder that leads through an impossible list of suspects.

programme.title: Monk: Mr. Monk Goes to a Bank
programme.desc: When the safety deposit box holding one of Monk's treasured possessions is robbed, Monk will do whatever it takes to solve the case.

programme.title: Entertainers With Byron Allen
programme.desc: Segment features Bill Murray, Alia Shawkat and Sophie Hyde, Vince Vaughn, Lily James, Niles Fitch and Isabella Blake-Thomas, Madison Iseman, Monrok, Cheech Marin, Margaret Cho, Zac Efron and Harry Styles.

programme.title: America's Court With Judge Ross: Bad Vinyl/ Smoked Out
programme.desc: Lawsuit over poor condition of vinyl records; former friend causes damage to apartment.

programme.desc: A plaintiff sues for the cost of artwork. A man sues the manager of golf course for property damage.

programme.desc: Judge Carroll Kelly advocates for the victims of crime by being tough, but fair.

programme.title: Ask Dr. LaViola

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Webster vs. Ware

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Amanda and Alex are suing their former landlord, Lawrence, for a security deposit, change in rental agreement, and upgrades mand on the home. Lawrence says their dogs caused substantial damage to the home's carpeting so he kept the deposit.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: A mother is suing her daughter and claims she loaned her money to help her after she got into a fight, but she has yet to be repaid.

programme.title: The People's Court

programme.desc: Jake comes into a windfall when Charlie takes him to the track, and Alan is stuck in that special hell known as the Department of Motor Vehicles.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Shopping
programme.desc: Beverly can't resist a good sale, even if it is something the family doesn't really need. Murray tells Beverly to stop her bargain hunting, despite her protests that she is saving the family money in the long run.

programme.title: Mom: Thigh Gap and a Rack of Lamb
programme.desc: Christy and Bonnie try to help Jodi, a teenage addict they met at their meeting.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Daddy Dearest
programme.desc: Mike and Ed take Ryan and his supposedly ailing dad on their hunting trip. Victor admits he wasn't truthful about his reasons for finally coming to see Ryan. Meanwhile, Vanessa tries to get more family members to attend Ryan and Kristin's wedding.

programme.title: Mom: Ocular Fluid and Fighting Robots
programme.desc: Christy's sponsor challenges her to be nice to Bonnie at all costs, and Bonnie is convinced that Adam has stopped making an effort.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Sheats vs. Rhodes

programme.title: Judge Jerry

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: The plaintiff says the defendant dated his uncle, and claims she makes money by posting explicit videos of herself online. He’s suing her for the balance due on a car, but she’s countersuing for repairs on the car.

programme.desc: Russel is suing Tim for unpaid rent and property damage, but Tim says he had an agreement with Russel in which he didn't have to pay any money until the deplorable conditions were made suitable.

programme.desc: Sam must capsize the wedding plans of his aristocratic ex-wife with a venomous hood.

programme.desc: As Adama plans a daring rescue mission, Sharon arrives in New Caprica to coordinate the insurgency.
